ConfigurationService } from './services/config.service';\nimport { ADYEN_EVENTS, AdyenWebhookPayload } from './interfaces/adyen-events';\nimport AdyenClient from './clients/adyen-client';\nimport { AdyenToRootAdapter, PaymentStatus } from './adapters/adyen-to-root-adapter';\n\nexport const processWebhookRequest = async (request: any) => {\n  const container = getContainer();\n  const logService = container.resolve<LogService>(ServiceToken.LOG_SERVICE);\n\n  try {\n    // ── Step 1: Verify webhook signature ──────────────────────────────────────\n\n    const providerClient = container.resolve<AdyenClient>(ServiceToken.PROVIDER_CLIENT);\n    const config = container.resolve<ConfigurationService>(ServiceToken.CONFIG_SERVICE);\n    const isValid = providerClient.verifyWebhookSignature(\n      { body: request.request.body, headers: request.request.headers },\n      config.get('providerWebhookSigningSecret'),\n    );\n    if (!isValid) {\n      logService.warn('Webhook signature verification failed', 'WebhookHandler');\n      return {\n        response: {\n          status: 403,\n          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n          body: JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid signature' }),\n        },\n      };\n    }\n\n    // ── Step 2: Parse event ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    const body =\n      typeof request.request.body === 'string'\n        ? request.request.body\n        : request.request.body.toString('utf-8');\n    const payload: AdyenWebhookPayload = JSON.parse(body);\n    const items = payload.notificationItems ?? [];\n\n    // Process each notification item (Adyen may batch multiple items)\n    for (const item of items) {\n      const notification = item.NotificationRequestItem;\n\n      logService.info('Received webhook', 'WebhookHandler', {\n        eventCode: notification.eventCode,\n        success: notification.success,\n        pspReference: notification.pspReference,\n      });\n\n      // ── Step 3: Route events ────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n      const adapter = new AdyenToRootAdapter();\n      const rootService = container.resolve<any>(ServiceToken.ROOT_SERVICE);\n      const isSuccess = notification.success === 'true';\n\n      switch (notification.eventCode) {\n        case ADYEN_EVENTS.AUTHORISATION: {\n          const status = isSuccess\n            ? PaymentStatus.Successful\n            : PaymentStatus.Failed;\n          const update = adapter.convertPaymentToRootUpdate(notification, {\n            status,\n            failureReason: isSuccess ? undefined : notification.reason,\n          });\n          await rootService.updatePaymentStatus(\n            notification.merchantReference,\n            update,\n          );\n          break;\n        }\n\n        case ADYEN_EVENTS.CANCELLATION: {\n          const update = adapter.convertPaymentToRootUpdate(notification, {\n            status: PaymentStatus.Cancelled,\n          });\n          await rootService.updatePaymentStatus(\n            notification.merchantReference,\n            update,\n          );\n          break;\n        }\n\n        case ADYEN_EVENTS.REFUND: {\n          if (isSuccess) {\n            const update = adapter.convertPaymentToRootUpdate(notification, {\n              status: PaymentStatus.Cancelled,\n            });\n            await rootService.updatePaymentStatus(\n              notification.merchantReference,\n              update,\n            );\n          }\n          break;\n        }\n\n        case ADYEN_EVENTS.REFUND_FAILED: {\n          logService.warn('Refund failed', 'WebhookHandler', {\n            pspReference: notification.pspReference,\n            reason: notification.reason,\n          });\n          break;\n        }\n\n        case ADYEN_EVENTS.CHARGEBACK: {\n          const update = adapter.convertPaymentToRootUpdate(notification, {\n            status: PaymentStatus.Failed,\n            failureReason: 'Chargeback received',\n          });\n          await rootService.updatePaymentStatus(\n            notification.merchantReference,\n            update,\n          );\n          break;\n        }\n\n        default:\n          logService.info(\n            `Unhandled event: ${notification.eventCode}`,\n            'WebhookHandler',\n          );\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Adyen requires \"[accepted]\" in the response body\n    return {\n      response: {\n        status: 200,\n        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n        body: '[accepted]',\n      },\n    };\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    logService.error('Error processing webhook', 'WebhookHandler', {\n      error: error.message,\n    });\n\n    return {\n      response: {\n        status: 500,\n        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ error: 'Internal server error' }),\n      },\n    };\n  }\n};"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":671,"cache_read_input_tokens":72630,"output_tokens":2343,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":671,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":2343,"cache_read_input_tokens":72630,"cache_creation_input_tokens":671,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":671},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CZuuRv7ZtCxNK6etaZSqj","type":"assistant","uuid":"8c366003-0cc5-400c-87a2-ea32df1324bf","timestamp":"2026-04-10T10:07:35.434Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/danielcabral/root-repos/cm/test_collection_module","sessionId":"0882c166-69dc-427f-976d-54dc4572c1e6","version":"2.1.100","gitBranch":"main","slug":"warm-greeting-harbor"}

* Adyen Service\n *\n * Implements PaymentProviderService for Adyen.\n *\n * Key differences from Stripe:\n * - No separate Customer API — shoppers are identified by shopperReference\n * - createCustomer() generates a shopper reference (no API call)\n * - createPaymentIntent() calls POST /payments\n * - attachPaymentMethod() stores the token ID (tokenization happens at payment time)\n * - cancelSubscription() disables stored payment method tokens\n */\n\nimport { LogService } from './log.service';\nimport AdyenClient from '../clients/adyen-client';\nimport { retryWithBackoff } from '../utils/retry';\nimport ModuleError from '../utils/error';\nimport {\n  PaymentProviderService,\n  CreateCustomerParams,\n  CreatePaymentIntentParams,\n  AttachPaymentMethodParams,\n  ProviderCustomer,\n  ProviderPaymentIntent,\n  ProviderPaymentMethod,\n  ProviderSubscription,\n} from '../interfaces/provider.interfaces';\n\nexport class AdyenService implements PaymentProviderService {\n  constructor(\n    private readonly logService: LogService,\n    private readonly providerClient: AdyenClient,\n  ) {}\n\n  /**\n   * Create a shopper reference for Adyen.\n   *\n   * Adyen has no Customer API — shoppers are identified by a shopperReference\n   * string passed with each payment. This method generates and returns the\n   * reference without making an API call.\n   */\n  async createCustomer(params: CreateCustomerParams): Promise<ProviderCustomer> {\n    this.logService.info('Creating customer (shopper reference)', 'AdyenService', params);\n\n    const shopperReference = params.metadata?.root_policy_id\n      ? `root_${params.metadata.root_policy_id}`\n      : `root_${Date.now()}`;\n\n    return {\n      id: shopperReference,\n      email: params.email,\n      name: params.name ?? null,\n      metadata: params.metadata,\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Get customer details.\n   *\n   * Since Adyen has no customer API, this returns the shopperReference as-is.\n   */\n  async getCustomer(customerId: string): Promise<ProviderCustomer> {\n    this.logService.info('Getting customer', 'AdyenService', { customerId });\n    return {\n      id: customerId,\n      email: null,\n      name: null,\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Update customer details.\n   *\n   * No-op for Adyen since there is no customer API.\n   */\n  async updateCustomer(\n    customerId: string,\n    params: { email?: string; name?: string; metadata?: Record<string, string> },\n  ): Promise<ProviderCustomer> {\n    this.logService.info('Updating customer', 'AdyenService', { customerId, ...params });\n    return {\n      id: customerId,\n      email: params.email ?? null,\n      name: params.name ?? null,\n      metadata: params.metadata,\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Create a payment via Adyen Checkout API.\n   *\n   * For merchant-initiated recurring payments, uses storedPaymentMethodId\n   * with shopperInteraction: ContAuth.\n   */\n  async createPaymentIntent(params: CreatePaymentIntentParams): Promise<ProviderPaymentIntent> {\n    this.logService.info('Creating payment intent', 'AdyenService', params);\n\n    try {\n      const merchantAccount = this.providerClient.getMerchantAccount();\n      const paymentMethodId = params.metadata?.paymentMethodId;\n\n      const requestBody: Record<string, any> = {\n        merchantAccount,\n        amount: {\n          currency: params.currency,\n          value: params.amount,\n        },\n        reference: params.metadata?.rootPaymentId ?? `payment_${Date.now()}`,\n        shopperReference: params.customerId,\n        shopperInteraction: 'ContAuth',\n        recurringProcessingModel: 'Subscription',\n        paymentMethod: {\n          type: 'scheme',\n          storedPaymentMethodId: paymentMethodId,\n        },\n      };\n\n      const response = await retryWithBackoff(() =>\n        this.providerClient.sdk.post<any>('/payments', requestBody),\n      );\n\n      return {\n        id: response.pspReference,\n        status: response.resultCode,\n        amount: params.amount,\n        currency: params.currency,\n      };\n    } catch (err) {\n      this.logService.error('Failed to create payment intent', 'AdyenService', { error: (err as Error).message });\n      throw new ModuleError('Failed to create payment intent', { cause: err });\n    }\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Attach a payment method (store the token reference).\n   *\n   * In Adyen, tokenization happens during the first payment with storePaymentMethod: true.\n   * The storedPaymentMethodId is received via webhook (recurring.token.created).\n   * This method simply records the association.\n   */\n  async attachPaymentMethod(params: AttachPaymentMethodParams): Promise<ProviderPaymentMethod> {\n    this.logService.info('Attaching payment method', 'AdyenService', params);\n    return {\n      id: params.paymentMethodId,\n      type: 'scheme',\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Get payment method details from Adyen.\n   */\n  async getPaymentMethod(paymentMethodId: string): Promise<ProviderPaymentMethod> {\n    this.logService.info('Getting payment method', 'AdyenService', { paymentMethodId });\n    return {\n      id: paymentMethodId,\n      type: 'scheme',\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Cancel a subscription by disabling the stored payment method token.\n   *\n   * Calls DELETE /storedPaymentMethods/{id} to remove the token.\n   */\n  async cancelSubscription(subscriptionId: string): Promise<ProviderSubscription> {\n    this.logService.info('Cancelling subscription (disabling token)', 'AdyenService', { subscriptionId });\n\n    try {\n      const merchantAccount = this.providerClient.getMerchantAccount();\n\n      await retryWithBackoff(() =>\n        this.providerClient.sdk.delete(\n          `/storedPaymentMethods/${subscriptionId}?merchantAccount=${encodeURIComponent(merchantAccount)}`,\n        ),\n      );\n\n      return {\n        id: subscriptionId,\n        status: 'disabled',\n      };\n    } catch (err) {\n      this.logService.error('Failed to cancel subscription', 'AdyenService', { error: (err as Error).message });\n      throw new ModuleError('Failed to cancel subscription } from './core/container';\nimport { LogService } from './services/log.service';\nimport { ConfigurationService } from './services/config.service';\nimport { ADYEN_EVENTS, AdyenWebhookPayload } from processWebhookRequest = async (request: any) => {\n  const container = getContainer();\n  const logService = container.resolve<LogService>(ServiceToken.LOG_SERVICE);\n\n  try {\n    // ── Step 1: Verify webhook signature ──────────────────────────────────────\n\n    const providerClient = container.resolve<AdyenClient>(ServiceToken.PROVIDER_CLIENT);\n    const config = },\n      config.get('providerWebhookSigningSecret'),\n    );\n    if (!isValid) {\n      logService.warn('Webhook signature verification failed', 'WebhookHandler');\n      return {\n        response: {\n          status: 403,\n          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n          body: JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid signature' }),\n        },\n      };\n    }\n\n    // ── Step 2: PaymentStatus.Successful\n            : PaymentStatus.Failed;\n          const update = adapter.convertPaymentToRootUpdate(notification, {\n            status,\n            failureReason: isSuccess ? (isSuccess) {\n            const update = adapter.convertPaymentToRootUpdate(notification, {\n              status: PaymentStatus.Cancelled,\n            });\n            await rootService.updatePaymentStatus(\n              notification.merchantReference,\n              update,\n            );\n          }\n          break;\n        }\n\n        case ADYEN_EVENTS.REFUND_FAILED: {\n          logService.warn('Refund failed', 'WebhookHandler', {\n            pspReference: notification.pspReference,\n            reason: notification.reason,\n          });\n          break;\n        }\n\n        case ADYEN_EVENTS.CHARGEBACK: {\n          const update = adapter.convertPaymentToRootUpdate(notification, {\n            status: PaymentStatus.Failed,\n `https://checkout-live.adyenpayments.com/checkout/v71`\n      : 'https://checkout-test.adyen.com/v71';\n\n    this.merchantAccount = config.get('providerMerchantAccount');\n\n    this.sdk = new BaseHttpClient({\n      baseUrl,\n      apiKey: config.get('providerSecretKey'),\n      defaultHeaders: {\n        'X-API-Key': config.get('providerSecretKey'),\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n      },\n    });\n  }\n\n  getMerchantAccount(): string {\n    return this.merchantAccount;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Verify an Adyen webhook HMAC signature.\n   *\n   * Adyen signs webhooks by concatenating specific fields from the NotificationRequestItem\n   * with colons, then computing HMAC-SHA256 using the hex-encoded HMAC key.\n   */\n  verifyWebhookSignature(request: WebhookRequest, secret: string): boolean {\n    try {\n      const body =\n        typeof request.body === 'string'\n          ? request.body\n          : request.body.toString('utf-8');\n      const payload = JSON.parse(body);\n\n      const notificationItems = payload.notificationItems;\n      if (!notificationItems || notificationItems.length === 0) {\n        return false;\n      }\n\n      const item: AdyenNotificationItem = notificationItems[0];\n      const notification = item.NotificationRequestItem;\n\n      const hmacSignature = notification.additionalData?.hmacSignature;\n      if (!hmacSignature) {\n        return false;\n      }\n\n      const signedPayload = [\n        notification.pspReference,\n        notification.originalReference,\n        notification.merchantAccountCode,\n        notification.merchantReference,\n        notification.amount.value,\n        notification.amount.currency,\n        notification.eventCode,\n        notification.success,\n      ].join(':');\n\n      const hmacKey = Buffer.from(secret, 'hex');\n      const computed = createHmac('sha256', hmacKey)\n        .update(signedPayload, 'utf-8')\n        .digest('base64');\n\n      return computed === hmacSignature;\n    } catch {\n      return false;\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":31,"oldLines":6,"newStart":31,"newLines":7,"lines":["       apiKey: config.get('providerSecretKey'),","       defaultHeaders: {","         'X-API-Key': config.get('providerSecretKey'),","+        Authorization: '',","         'Content-Type': 'application/json',","       },","     });"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"634d67e9-5b6d-48c2-9217-e1f6a5e066dd","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/danielcabral/root-repos/cm/test_collection_module/collection_module","sessionId":"0882c166-69dc-427f-976d-54dc4572c1e6","version":"2.1.100","gitBranch":"main","slug":"warm-greeting-harbor"}
